worker.description: Routine implementation worker for scoped changes

planner.description: Planning-focused work for design and execution plans

researcher.description: Read-only context gathering across the repository

debugger.description: Root-cause debugging for bugs and regressions

frontend-engineer.description: Frontend implementation focused on UI behavior

backend-engineer.description: Backend implementation focused on APIs and domain logic

platform-engineer.description: Platform and runtime work across deployment and environments

data-engineer.description: Data pipelines, data models, and migration-oriented work

security-engineer.description: Security-sensitive work across auth and trust boundaries

integrations-engineer.description: External API, webhook, and integration contract work

reviewer.description: Review-only work focused on bugs and regressions

release-manager.description: Release readiness, CI gates, and branch finish decisions

skill-author.description: Create and refine reusable workflow skills
